'''rakara''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ibandronate|ibandronate]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-k-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ibandronate|ibandronate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| rakara
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:rækæræth|rækæræth]] || [[word:rækæræj|rækæræj]] || [[word:rækæræsh|rækæræsh]] || [[word:rækæræ|rækæræ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:rakakarath|rakakarath]] || [[word:rakakaraj|rakakaraj]] || [[word:rakakarash|rakakarash]] || [[word:rakakara|rakakara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:rakarath|rakarath]] || [[word:rakaraj|rakaraj]] || [[word:rakarash|rakarash]] || [[word:rakara|rakara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:rakafrath|rakafrath]] || [[word:rakafraj|rakafraj]] || [[word:rakafrash|rakafrash]] || [[word:rakafraf|rakafraf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rakaratha|rakaratha]] || [[word:rakaraja|rakaraja]] || [[word:rakarasha|rakarasha]] || [[word:rakaraka|rakaraka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rakarath|rakarath]] || [[word:rakaraj|rakaraj]] || [[word:rakarash|rakarash]] || [[word:rakara|rakara]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rakarathal|rakarathal]] || [[word:rakarajal|rakarajal]] || [[word:rakarashal|rakarashal]] || [[word:rakarakal|rakarakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rakarathatha|rakarathatha]] || [[word:rakarajaja|rakarajaja]] || [[word:rakarashasha|rakarashasha]] || [[word:rakaraka|rakaraka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rakarathan|rakarathan]] || [[word:rakarajan|rakarajan]] || [[word:rakarashan|rakarashan]] || [[word:rakarakan|rakarakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rakarathaoro|rakarathaoro]] || [[word:rakarajaoro|rakarajaoro]] || [[word:rakarashaoro|rakarashaoro]] || [[word:rakarakaoro|rakarakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
